CorrectionReviewRerunState.description: State model derived from CorrectionReviewRerun TLA+ spec

AttemptPositive.description: Verifier for invariant AttemptPositive from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

AttemptBounded.description: Verifier for invariant AttemptBounded from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

HistoryLengthInvariant.message:
HistoryLengthInvariant violation: \/ (phase = "RunReview"     /\ Len(history) = attempt - 1)
    \/ (phase = "RunCorrection" /\ Len(history) = attempt)...
HistoryLengthInvariant.description: Verifier for invariant HistoryLengthInvariant from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

CorrectionsAppendOnly.description: Verifier for invariant CorrectionsAppendOnly from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

CorrectionsTerminalBound.description: Verifier for invariant CorrectionsTerminalBound from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

VerdictFromLatest.description: Verifier for invariant VerdictFromLatest from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

CostAccumulation.description: Verifier for invariant CostAccumulation from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

AllSids.description: Verifier for invariant AllSids from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

SessionIdsUnique.description: Verifier for invariant SessionIdsUnique from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

IndependentTracking.description: Verifier for invariant IndependentTracking from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

TerminalVerdictOrExhausted.description: Verifier for invariant TerminalVerdictOrExhausted from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

SamePassReRun.message:
SamePassReRun violation: TRUE

VARIABLES verd, sid
SamePassReRun.description: Verifier for invariant SamePassReRun from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_AttemptPositive.description: Test assertion for AttemptPositive from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_AttemptBounded.description: Test assertion for AttemptBounded from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_HistoryLengthInvariant.condition:
or (phase = "RunReview"     and Len(history) = attempt - 1)
    or (phase = "RunCorrection" and Len(history) = attempt)
    or (phase = "IncrAttempt"   and Len(history) = attempt)
    or (phase = "Finish"        and Len(history) = attempt)
assert_HistoryLengthInvariant.message:
Assertion failed: HistoryLengthInvariant — \/ (phase = "RunReview"     /\ Len(history) = attempt - 1)
    \/ (phase = "RunCorrection" /\ Len(history) = attempt)...
assert_HistoryLengthInvariant.description: Test assertion for HistoryLengthInvariant from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_CorrectionsAppendOnly.description: Test assertion for CorrectionsAppendOnly from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_CorrectionsTerminalBound.message: Assertion failed: CorrectionsTerminalBound — phase = "Finish" => Len(corrections) <= Len(history) - 1
assert_CorrectionsTerminalBound.description: Test assertion for CorrectionsTerminalBound from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_VerdictFromLatest.message: Assertion failed: VerdictFromLatest — Len(history) > 0 => currentVerdict = history[Len(history)].verdict
assert_VerdictFromLatest.description: Test assertion for VerdictFromLatest from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_CostAccumulation.message: Assertion failed: CostAccumulation — totalCost = SumCosts(history) + SumCosts(corrections)
assert_CostAccumulation.description: Test assertion for CostAccumulation from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_AllSids.description: Test assertion for AllSids from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_SessionIdsUnique.message: Assertion failed: SessionIdsUnique — Cardinality(AllSids) = Len(history) + Len(corrections)
assert_SessionIdsUnique.description: Test assertion for SessionIdsUnique from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_IndependentTracking.description: Test assertion for IndependentTracking from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_TerminalVerdictOrExhausted.message:
Assertion failed: TerminalVerdictOrExhausted — phase = "Finish" =>
        (currentVerdict = "PASS" \/ attempt >= MaxRetries)
assert_TerminalVerdictOrExhausted.description: Test assertion for TerminalVerdictOrExhausted from CorrectionReviewRerun spec

assert_SamePassReRun.message:
Assertion failed: SamePassReRun — TRUE

VARIABLES verd, sid
assert_SamePassReRun.description: Test assertion for SamePassReRun from CorrectionReviewRerun spec
